A writable array accessor that can be converted into an

title: Class FastImmutableArray<T>.Builder
content:
Class FastImmutableArray<T>.Builder

Namespace
Alis.Core.Aspect.Math.Collections
Assembly
Alis.dll

A writable array accessor that can be converted into an instance without allocating memory.

[ExcludeFromCodeCoverage]
public sealed class FastImmutableArray<T>.Builder : IList<T>, ICollection<T>, IReadOnlyList<T>, IReadOnlyCollection<T>, IEnumerable<T>, IEnumerable

DrainToImmutable()

Returns the current contents as an and sets the collection to a zero length array.

public FastImmutableArray<T> DrainToImmutable()

Returns

FastImmutableArray<T>

An immutable array.

Remarks

If equals , the internal array will be extracted as an without copying the contents. Otherwise, the contents will be copied into a new array. The collection will then be set to a zero length array.
